title: matelea nummularia
intro: Matelea nummularia, also known as the Money Plant, is a type of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Matelea nummularia can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for medicinal use, although its effects and safety should be further researched and studied.
